$comment: Routing eval cases for scripts/run-evals.js. Each case is a realistic user prompt plus the skill that should win the TF-IDF ranking against every skill description in this repo. Populate with 2-5 prompts per skill, including paraphrases that do NOT reuse the description's exact wording. CI enforces a rank-1 floor (see .github/workflows/test.yml).

prompts.prompt: run the demo workflow to example the widget for me
show me how the example template skill demonstrates frontmatter and routing evals
